3i Group plc ( (GB:III) ) has issued an update.

3i Group plc announced an allotment of shares under its Share Incentive Plan, bringing the total issued ordinary shares to 973,389,719, each carrying one vote at general meetings. data.title: Credessential Integrates Cryptocurrency Wallet Infrastructure
data.description:
Axiom Capital Advisors, Inc. (TSE:WHIP) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Credessential Inc. is set to integrate Privy’s advanced cryptocurrency wallet infrastructure into its tech ecosystem, enhancing its applications with cryptocurrency transaction capabilities. This move aims to empower US independent auto dealerships with the ability to accept and manage cryptocurrency payments, potentially attracting a broader customer base. Credessential’s initiative aligns with its mission to democratize finance by offering secure and innovative solutions for modern consumers.

data.title: Manitex International Acquired by Tadano, Delists from NASDAQ
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Manitex International ( (MNTX) ) has provided an announcement.

Manitex International has announced the completion of its acquisition by Tadano Ltd., resulting in Manitex becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Tadano. As part of the acquisition, Manitex’s shares are no longer publicly traded on NASDAQ, which marks a significant change in the company’s market presence, and shareholders received $5.80 in cash per share. This acquisition reflects a strategic move by Tadano to enhance its global market positioning in the construction and industrial equipment sectors.

More about Manitex International

Manitex International, Inc. is a leading provider of mobile truck cranes, industrial lifting solutions, aerial work platforms, construction equipment, and rental solutions. The company serves general construction, crane companies, and heavy industry, engineering and manufacturing its products in North America and Europe, and distributing through independent dealers globally. Its brands include Manitex, PM, Oil & Steel, Valla, and Rabern Rentals.

Average Trading Volume: 109,213

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $118.3M

Learn more about MNTX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Beverly JCG Ltd. Receives SGX Approval for Share Listing
data.description:
Beverly JCG Ltd. (SG:9QX) has released an update.

  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Beverly JCG Ltd. has received approval from the Singapore Exchange to list and quote over 59 million shares on the Catalist Board. These shares, issued at varying prices per share, will be allocated to investors Tan Chin Hong and Lim Beoy Kee, and to Evolve Capital Advisory as payment for services. The move highlights the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its capital base and engage key financial partners.

data.title: CAF Reports Balanced Liquidity Operations for 2024

Construcciones y Auxiliar de Ferrocarriles (CAF) has released its financial activity report for the last quarter of 2024, showcasing its operations under a liquidity contract with Kutxabank Investment. During this period, the company executed significant transactions, with purchases and sales closely balanced, resulting in a slight decrease in the final cash balance. Such activity illustrates CAF’s strategic financial management aimed at maintaining market liquidity and stability.

data.title: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Announces CFO Resignation
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

ImmunoPrecise Antibodies ( (IPA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. announced that Kristin Taylor, the Chief Financial Officer, will resign effective January 16, 2025, but will stay on as a consultant thereafter. The company has initiated a CFO succession process, highlighting its ongoing commitment to maintaining robust financial planning and operational continuity.

More about ImmunoPrecise Antibodies

ImmunoPrecise Antibodies Ltd. is a biotechnology company specializing in multi-omics modeling and complex artificial intelligence through proprietary technologies. The company offers an integrated suite of capabilities for developing therapeutic antibodies and addresses complex industry challenges, with subsidiaries in North America and Europe.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Holdings in Spirent Communications
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Spirent Communications ( (GB:SPT) ).

Morgan Stanley has adjusted its holdings in Spirent Communications PLC, reducing its voting rights from 8.339745% to 7.858413%. This change reflects a disposal of financial instruments and impacts the shareholder’s influence within the company, potentially affecting strategic decisions and signaling shifts in investor confidence.

More about Spirent Communications

Spirent Communications PLC is a UK-based company operating in the telecommunications industry. The company specializes in providing testing, analysis, and assurance solutions for networks, cybersecurity, and positioning.
